query:
SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug, COUNT(f.id) as file_count 
FROM organizations o 
LEFT JOIN intakeFileAttachments f ON o.id = f.organizationId 
WHERE o.name LIKE '%RRMC%' OR o.slug LIKE '%rrmc%'
GROUP BY o.id, o.name, o.slug;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.id, o.name, o.slug, COUNT(f.id) as file_count
